events: Kim Gongja envies the Flame Emperor's success
Kim discovers his S-rank skill: 'I want to become just like you'
Skill activates upon death and copies enemy skills
Kim's skill is considered trash because it requires dying
skills: I want to become just like you (S+)
cause_effect: Kim's extreme envy of Flame Emperor → awakens S-rank skill
Skill's condition requires death → seemingly useless
chapters.notes: Kim is an F-class hunter living alone, obsessed with the Flame Emperor's success

events: Kim gets drunk in an alley after discovering his trash skill
Kim witnesses Flame Emperor confronting the Saintess
Flame Emperor claims Saintess tried to poison him
Flame Emperor reveals his real name: Yoo Sooha
cause_effect: Kim's depression over trash skill → gets drunk → witnesses murder
Flame Emperor's paranoia → confronts and kills Saintess
chapters.notes: Flame Emperor mentions a 'Lie Detection skill' as a bluff

events: Flame Emperor kills Saintess with fire
Flame Emperor discovers Kim witnessing the murder
Flame Emperor kills Kim by burning his head
Kim's skill activates: copies Flame Emperor's skill
Kim catches the golden skill card
loops: Kim dies and copies Flame Emperor's regression skill
cause_effect: Kim witnesses murder → Flame Emperor kills him to silence him
Kim's death → skill activates → copies 'Returner's Clockwork Watch'
Kim's envy-driven skill → allows copying even EX-rank skills
chapters.notes: Flame Emperor says 'My name is Yoo Sooha. Good bye.' before killing Kim

events: Kim returns 24 hours before death using copied skill
Kim plans revenge against Flame Emperor
Kim discovers Flame Emperor's weakness: regression to 24 hours prior
Kim realizes killing Flame Emperor is impossible because he'd just regress
Kim finds clue: Flame Emperor awakened on June 7th, 11 years ago on 1st floor
loops: Kim returns 24 hours prior to his death
cause_effect: Copied 'Returner's Clockwork Watch' → Kim can now time regress
Flame Emperor's regression ability → makes him seemingly invincible
Kim discovers Flame Emperor's awakening date → finds way to kill him in the past
chapters.notes: Kim realizes he must kill Yoo Sooha before he becomes the Flame Emperor

events: Kim commits suicide 4091 times using a knife
Each death sends him back 24 hours
Newspaper clippings of Flame Emperor's achievements fade away one by one
Kim erases Flame Emperor's history progressively
Flame Emperor's legend begins to disappear
loops: 4091 time loops via suicide, each sending Kim 24 hours back
cause_effect: Kim's suicides → progressive time regression → erases Flame Emperor's history
Each death removes one of Flame Emperor's achievements from the timeline
chapters.notes: Kim's kill count becomes 4091 due to repeated suicides

events: Kim kills Yoo Sooha before he becomes Flame Emperor
Meadow wolves eat Yoo Sooha's body
Kim buries bloody clothes and changes
Kim returns to Babylon, no one suspects him
News shows 10th floor strategy failed, Sword Saint still missing
deaths: Yoo Sooha (stabbed by Kim, eaten by wolves)
cause_effect: Kim kills Yoo Sooha in the past → prevents him from becoming Flame Emperor
Yoo Sooha's death → his future achievements erased from history
chapters.notes: Yoo Sooha is not yet the Flame Emperor, just a Rank 1 candidate

events: Kim sees Sword Saint in a tavern
Sword Saint drinks milk with vodka and honey
Kim recognizes Sword Saint from newspaper clipping
Kim realizes he can copy Sword Saint's skills too
Sword Saint has S-rank skills and 'Detective's Insight'
cause_effect: Kim's realization about his skill → plans to copy Sword Saint's abilities
Sword Saint's appearance confirms Kim is in the past
chapters.notes: Sword Saint is current Rank 1, will disappear in 22 days

events: Kim researches Sword Saint online
Sword Saint's real name: Marcus Calenberry, from Northern Europe
Sword Saint has habit of muttering to himself
Forum post reveals trigger: mentioning Sword Saint's family/grandchildren gets you killed
Sword Saint left his family and fortune to enter the Tower
deaths: Top-ranking hunter (mentioned in forum, killed for mentioning grandchildren)
cause_effect: Kim learns Sword Saint's trauma → plans to provoke him to get killed and copy skills
chapters.notes: Sword Saint seems to talk to himself but may be communicating via skill

events: Kim provokes Sword Saint about his grandchildren
Sword Saint beheads Kim instantly with one strike
Kim sees 'One Hit KO' before dying
Kim copies 'Sword Constellation' from Sword Saint
Kim's head is cut off cleanly
cause_effect: Kim provokes Sword Saint → gets killed → copies 'Sword Constellation'
Sword Saint's family trigger → instant death for offenders
chapters.notes: Kim describes the beheading as 'beautiful', like a clean street

events: Bae Hu-ryeong appears as a ghost attached to Kim
Bae Hu-ryeong is Sword Saint's master/teacher
Bae Hu-ryeong complains about being 'kidnapped' by Kim's skill
Sword Saint's muttering was actually him talking to Bae Hu-ryeong
Bae Hu-ryeong reveals Sword Saint's 'Detective's Insight' is a 'crap skill'
Bae Hu-ryeong sees Kim's kill count is 4091
cause_effect: Kim copies Sword Constellation → also copies attached ghost Bae Hu-ryeong
Bae Hu-ryeong knows all of Sword Saint's skills → becomes valuable informant
chapters.notes: Bae Hu-ryeong died after reaching the 99th floor, was attached to Sword Saint

events: Bae Hu-ryeong wakes Kim up at 4am for training
Kim buys a lottery ticket using future knowledge
Kim wins 1st prize lottery from Sangryun Merchant's Union
Count is Rank 3 and only one who can send/receive items from outside
Kim gets capital for training expenses
cause_effect: Future knowledge → Kim knows winning lottery numbers → gets funds
Money → can buy elixirs for training
chapters.notes: Bae Hu-ryeong reveals Count is a pervert who makes employees wear cat ears

events: Bae Hu-ryeong demands expensive elixirs for training
Kim and Bae Hu-ryeong hide from Sword Saint behind a trash can
Sword Saint enters the best elixir shop
Kim uses phone to check top ranker list
Kim knows a skilled pharmacist from before his regression
cause_effect: Sword Saint's presence → forces Kim to find alternative elixir source
Kim's future knowledge → knows a skilled pharmacist in the slums
chapters.notes: Top rankers listed: Sword Saint(1), Black Dragon Witch(2), Count(3), Heretic Questioner(4), Venomous Snake(5), Babel's Linguist(6), Kwangyeok Messenger(7), Crusader(8)

events: Kim meets a skilled female pharmacist in the slums
Pharmacist's shop is messy and appears poor
Kim orders 20,000 Gold worth of custom elixirs
Pharmacist refuses to make drugs despite financial need
Bae Hu-ryeong provides recipe for reflex/intensifying elixir
Pharmacist recognizes the complex combination
Delivery ready in 4 days
cause_effect: Lottery winnings → funds for custom elixirs
Bae Hu-ryeong's recipe + pharmacist's skill → potent training elixir
chapters.notes: Pharmacist has strong morals, refuses to make drugs even when desperate

events: Kim fights an orc in slowed time (about 50 seconds)
Kim learns to feel and use Aura for the first time
Bae Hu-ryeong explains Aura pathways like mountain roads
Kim narrowly avoids orc's club twice
Kim successfully uses Aura to jump and cut orc's throat
Bae Hu-ryeong warns orc skin is tough
cause_effect: Elixirs → Kim can sense Aura → survives orc fight
Bae Hu-ryeong's training → Kim learns to focus Aura on body parts
chapters.notes: Bae Hu-ryeong calls Kim 'Zombie' and says he has 'abyss-level' talent

events: Kim kills orc, skill activation triggers
Kim can copy orc's skill
Two orange/bronze cards appear: 'Blessing of Reproduction' and 'Chiik, Chik'
Bae Hu-ryeong can see the front of the cards while Kim cannot
Kim realizes Bae Hu-ryeong's ghost form allows him to see card fronts
Kim chooses 'Chiik, Chik' over 'Blessing of Reproduction'
cause_effect: Orc's death → Kim can copy its skill
Bae Hu-ryeong can see card fronts → gives Kim advantage in skill selection
chapters.notes: Skills copied from monsters are lower rank. Bae Hu-ryeong calls it a 'cheat'
